name: SDE-1 Job Search & Application Tracker v2 (Ollama)

parameters.subject: ={{ '🚀 ' + $json.title + ' at ' + $json.company + ' — Match: ' + $json.ai_score + '/10' }}
parameters.message:
={{ '

New Job Match!

Role: ' + $json.title + '
Company: ' + $json.company + '
Location: ' + $json.location + '
AI Match Score: ' + $json.ai_score + '/10
Why it fits: ' + $json.ai_reason + '
Salary: ' + ($json.salary_min ? $json.salary_min + ' - ' + $json.salary_max + ' INR' : 'Not listed') + '

👉 View & Apply on Adzuna
Sent by your n8n job search bot' }}
